business_insights.source_summary: Jupiter H10: Pro-clever/skill work; Con-excessive benevolence as work.
business_insights.recommended_business_activities: Work involving cleverness/strategy. Skill-based work (hands-on, हुनरबंदी के काम).
business_insights.discouraged_business_activities: Charity work or overtly benevolent acts as primary focus (लोगों के भलाई के काम नहीं करने चाहिए).
business_insights.general_advice: Should act with shrewdness rather than excessive benevolence in professional matters.

business_insights.source_summary: Mars in H1/H8/H9: Work instability until son's birth.
business_insights.general_advice: Work/job instability or frequent changes may occur until a son is born. Stability in career is seen after the birth of a son.

business_insights.source_summary: Rahu in Gemini/Virgo sign: Avoid dairy, soil, milch animal businesses. (Requires sign data)
business_insights.discouraged_business_activities: Work related to soil (मिट्टी), milk (दूध), milch animals (दुधारू पशु), dairy farming (डेरी के कार्य).
business_insights.general_advice: This rule applies if Rahu is in Gemini or Virgo sign. Current chart data does not include planetary signs. Please check manually.

business_insights.recommended_business_activities: Business in general (Excellent results, can become a big industrialist).

business_insights.source_summary: Sun+Mercury in H1 or H5: Special Pro Mercury work.
Sun+Mercury conjunction (auspicious, no Saturn aspect): Pro Govt sector.
business_insights.general_advice: Benefit from Government sector if Sun+Mercury conjunction is auspicious and NOT aspected by Saturn. (Auspiciousness of conjunction and aspect check are complex and require detailed chart data beyond simple positions).

multi_house_scenario_analysis: More planets in H1 (King) than H7 (Minister): Potential for disorder/chaos.

[Karmic Ledger Analysis (H2, H6, H8, H11, H12)]
Effects of H6 (Moon) can transfer to H12 (Saturn), impacting losses/expenditures.
Generally, H12 influence does not transfer back to H6 (unless Mercury in H12).
[Axis of Fortune, Action, Progeny, Gains (H3, H5, H9, H10, H11)]
Structural principle: H10 (Profession) is inherently in conflict with H5 (Progeny/Creativity).
[Foundation of Worldly Comforts (H2, H4, H10, often H9)]
H10 (Jupiter) occupied & H2 empty: H10 may have no luster; potential deprivation of worldly comforts.
Monsoon Winds: H9 empty - 'Monsoon clouds' (fortune) may not form, affecting 'rain' (comforts) in H4.
